fields.name: branch_id
fields.description: Stable PT60 retained candidate branch identifier.

fields.name: circuit_id
fields.description: Stable reconstructed circuit/group identifier from the fail-closed merge step.

fields.name: from_facility_uid
fields.description: Canonical source-side facility identifier assigned by the reconstruction pipeline.

fields.name: from_facility_code
fields.description: Public source code for the source-side facility where available.

fields.name: from_facility_name
fields.description: Public source name for the source-side facility where available.

fields.name: from_facility_type
fields.description: Release field `from_facility_type` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: to_facility_uid
fields.description: Canonical target-side facility identifier assigned by the reconstruction pipeline.

fields.name: to_facility_code
fields.description: Public source code for the target-side facility where available.

fields.name: to_facility_name
fields.description: Public source name for the target-side facility where available.

fields.name: to_facility_type
fields.description: Release field `to_facility_type` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: voltage
fields.description: Voltage class encoded in the public source or derived candidate record.
fields.unit: kV or V as encoded by field; see field description

fields.name: status
fields.description: Operational/status text encoded in the public source record.

fields.name: total_length_km
fields.description: Candidate circuit or branch length in kilometres.

fields.name: number_of_original_segments
fields.description: Release field `number_of_original_segments` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: geometry
fields.description: GeoJSON geometry encoded as text in release CSV files.
fields.unit: WGS84 longitude/latitude coordinates unless otherwise stated

fields.name: source_line_ids
fields.description: Comma-separated public source line identifiers contributing to this record.

fields.name: confidence_score
fields.description: Internal candidate-construction confidence score; not a probability, precision estimate, or operator validation.

fields.name: classification
fields.description: Fail-closed disposition class for a reconstructed circuit or branch.

fields.name: r
fields.description: Release field `r` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: x
fields.description: Release field `x` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: b
fields.description: Release field `b` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: thermal_limit
fields.description: Release field `thermal_limit` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: transformer_impedance
fields.description: Release field `transformer_impedance` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.

fields.name: tap_settings
fields.description: Release field `tap_settings` from `core_topology/at_interfacility_candidate_branches.csv`.
